caption: The video shows a close-up view of a car's dashboard, specifically focusing on the tachometer and the digital display. The tachometer needle is pointing towards the lower end of the RPM range, indicating that the engine is not running. The digital display on the right side of the dashboard shows a message instructing the driver to "Press Brake and Push Button to Start," with a red brake warning light illuminated above it. This suggests that the car is in a stationary position and requires the driver to press the brake pedal before starting the engine. The odometer reading at the bottom of the display indicates that the car has been driven for 20434 miles. The scene captures the moment just before the car is started, emphasizing the necessary steps for ignition.
